items.title: JEPI: Higher Payouts Ahead
items.description: JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF remains resilient in 2026 volatility, delivering over 3% YTD price return, excluding dividends. Read more on JEPI here.

items.title: Top 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy for Strong Returns in 2026
items.description: Volatility is again picking up, and it’s a good idea to focus more on safety. There’s no better way to do so than to buy Dividend Aristocrat stocks like Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM), PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), and Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ). These stocks have what it takes to deliver strong returns in 2026. Now, many investors are ... Top 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy for Strong Returns in 2026

items.title: Bayer Q4 Earnings Match Estimates, Xarelto and Eylea Pull Down Sales
items.description: BAYRY posts in-line Q4 earnings but revenues miss on lower Xarelto and Eylea sales. 2026 sales guidance signals steady growth ahead.

items.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
